nodes.label: Historical Cycle of Capital, War, and Competition
nodes.source_file: references/sources/articles/2026-06-17 171113_冰冰小美_资本市场有100年魔咒，比如荷兰，西班牙，法国，英国，美国主导的都是100年就衰退。衰退的直接原因都是战争。越是强大的资.md
author: [[冰冰小美]]
nodes.rationale: A proposed historical cycle links dominant capitalist powers, war, and decline; technological competition and restraint are presented as preferable to conflict.
